name: rilo-ai-platform-impianti
description: Rilo Digital Planning — monorepo for electrical engineering AI modules

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "LAUNCH,CABLE,LOAD" --prefix-colors "cyan,red,green" "npm run dev --workspace=launcher" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/cablefill" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/load-analysis"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=launcher && npm run build --workspace=apps/cablefill && npm run build --workspace=apps/load-analysis
scripts.install:all: npm install --workspace=apps/cablefill && npm install --workspace=apps/load-analysis && npm install --workspace=launcher
